Assessment Page

The Assessments Page template is used to build pages that contain various subpages stored in tabs.

Chapters List

Name Type Authored? Content Searchable? Source Notes
Chapters Label short text yes max 80 chars
Chapter Content long text yes

Roles and Responsibilities List

Name Type Authored? Content Searchable? Source Notes
Role Label short text yes max 80 chars
Role Content long text yes

Opportunities

Name Type Authored? Content Searchable? Source Notes
Opportunity Link href yes destination page url

Workshops

Name Type Authored? Content Searchable? Source Notes
Workshop Title href yes destination page url
Date date yes format Mon, dd
Time time yes format hour AM/ PM - hour AM/PM
Summary long text yes
Registration Link href yes Registration
Agenda PDF Attachment href yes Agenda

FAQs List

Name Type Authored? Content Searchable? Source Notes
FAQ Label short text yes max 80 chars
FAQ Content long text yes

Timeline

Name Type Authored? Content Searchable? Source Notes
Date date yes
Content long text yes

Functionality Specifications

This section show the details on how to build the page based on the author selections.

Page Header

The page header includes the page title (h1)

Tabs

9 tabs can fit on one full-width page

  • Label
  • Tab Content (opperates like a subpage and can include text, rich text, various components, etc.)

Overview

An overview of the Assessment Report.

  • Upcoming Events - Card Components
  • Link to events landing page
  • About Section - long text
  • Previous Assessments Links - urls
  • Sustained Resources Links - urls

Mandate

  • Rich Text

Chapters

  • Accordion - accordion label (short text), accordion content (rich text)

Roles and Responisibilities

  • Accordion - accordion label (short text), accordion content (rich text)

Regions

  • Summary - long text
  • Media - map of the specified regions within the US
  • Map Legend

Engagement

  • Rich Text

Workshops

Collection Component:

  • Date
  • Time
  • PDF Link
  • Registration Link
  • Agenda Link
  • Description - short text

FAQs

  • Accordion - accordion label (short text), accordion content (rich text)

Timeline

Process List Component

  • Label - date (YYYY format)
  • Unordered List
